description_long: This is a two-story modern house surrounded by a light-colored fence and featuring a spacious yard with green grass and paved walkways. The house has a flat roof, large rectangular windows with blue shutters, and a mix of white and pastel blue exterior walls. There is a covered carport on one side, with multiple vehicles parked beneath a blue awning, and a balcony with white railings above it. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a small pool, while the front yard is accessible through a wide gate. The overall design is clean and geometric, with open terraces and a blend of indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, blue shutters, and a fenced yard featuring a carport, balcony, and patio. The exterior is pastel blue and white, with open terraces and a small pool.
description_view_0: This view shows the front facade with two large windows, a main entrance gate, and a glimpse of the carport and balcony on the right.
description_view_1: The carport with multiple vehicles and a blue awning is prominent, along with the main double gate and a covered patio area.
description_view_2: The rear of the house reveals a spacious backyard, patio furniture, a small pool, and the balcony above, with more windows and a secondary entrance.
description_view_3: This view highlights the back of the house with two large windows, a green lawn, and the fenced perimeter, as well as the upper terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows and blue shutters
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with glass panels, a small overhang, and a wide gate integrated into the front fence.
